title: AFI Version-Pinned UWR Profile v0 (Testnet-Provisional DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION schema for a version-pinned UWR (Universal Weighting Rule) profile document. This v0 schema is the registration gate for exactly one profile — uwr-weighted-lifts-v0.1 — so every governed value is pinned as a const: any deviating document fails validation. All values are TESTNET-PROVISIONAL, not production scoring law. Nothing in this schema is consumed at runtime; afi-core defaultUwrConfig remains in place unchanged until a separately authorized runtime PR consumes the registered profile. A future profile or value change requires a new governance decision, a new profile id, and a new schema version.
$comment: Authorized by afi-governance/decisions/uwr-profile-pin-v0.1.md UP-12, which authorizes PR-UWR-CONFIG only (profile schema + registry instance + examples + tests + KAT vector files + docs section, all draft-non-implementation). The decision's §6 non-authorization list is binding: no runtime consumption, no scoring code, no qualification wiring, no golden re-pinning.
x-afiPartOf: AFI version-pinned UWR profile registry (uwr-profile-pin-v0.1, PR-UWR-CONFIG)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/uwr-profile-pin-v0.1.md — pins profile uwr-weighted-lifts-v0.1 (UP-1..UP-12); authorizes PR-UWR-CONFIG only
afi-governance/decisions/math-authority-v0.1.md §3 — UWR scoring grammar; profiles only become protocol-recognized if registered and pinned; profile mappings and KATs live in afi-config
afi-governance/decisions/mint-formula-bt-86b-alignment-v0.1.md §7 — reserved 'UWR profile/mapping system' slot (profile-registration half filled by this registration)

x-afiOpenItems.UP-8: Decay-engine canonicality (GreeksDecayTemplate.applyTimeDecay vs validators/SignalDecay.ts) — OPEN, deferred to the existing PR-7 slot (math-authority-v0.1.md §8). This profile pins the GreeksDecayTemplate SURFACE only.
x-afiOpenItems.thetaBias: Declared but not consumed by any computation. Values are recorded as declared surface; behavior is NOT pinned. Any future activation requires its own decision.
x-afiOpenItems.linear-cliff: The linear and cliff decay models exist only as type/schema surface with no evaluator; they are documented, NOT pinned.

schema.description: Schema version identifier for the version-pinned UWR profile document format (v0, draft-non-implementation). Distinct from the profile's own version, which is carried in profileId.

x-afiStatus.description: Artifact lifecycle marker carried on the document itself per UP-12 (all PR-UWR-CONFIG artifacts are marked draft-non-implementation).

profileId.description: Canonical id of the version-pinned UWR profile (UP-2). Encodes Open Decision 8's classification of the current scorer ('UWR v0.1 weighted-lifts profile'). Any future weight or value change is a NEW profile version (a new id), never a mutation of this one.

humanAlias.description: OPTIONAL human-facing display alias ONLY (UP-1). It must never be used as a repo identifier, schema $id, field name, or profile id.

status.description: Value-provisionality status: every value pinned by this profile is testnet-provisional, NOT final production scoring law (production values require their own decision informed by testnet data).

supersedes.description: OPTIONAL record that this registration supersedes the placeholder configuration id 'uwr-default-stub' as the referenced configuration (UP-2). The afi-core code switch is NOT authorized by PR-UWR-CONFIG; defaultUwrConfig remains in place unchanged until a separately authorized runtime PR consumes this profile.

engine.description: Engine pin (UP-3): computeUwrScore, a normalized weighted average of four clamped axes returning a score in [0, 1]. The engine is a protocol-level primitive that MUST NOT be modified by reputation and must not be silently mutated by analysts. The general whitepaper §7.3 combiner (base/guards/penalties/lifts) remains NOT implemented and deferred.

axes.description: Axis registry for this profile, exactly and in this order (UP-4, order significant), matching AnalystScoreTemplate.uwrAxes and UwrAxesInput in afi-core. Provisionally closes SS-O3 FOR THIS PROFILE ONLY; the org-wide open item in schemas/provenance/v1/scored-signal.schema.json remains OPEN under District 2 authority.

weights.description: Weights pin (UP-5), field names exactly as in afi-core UniversalWeightingRuleConfig. These are the values already used by defaultUwrConfig, so pinning them changes no scored output: the D2 M2 golden anchor uwrScore 0.1875 = mean(0.15, 0, 0.2, 0.4) must hold byte-for-byte. Any future weight change is a new profile version (a new id).

outputSurface.description: Output surface pins (UP-6). uwrScore normalized to [0, 1] provisionally closes SS-O2 FOR THIS PROFILE ONLY; the riskBucket taxonomy provisionally closes SS-O1 FOR THIS PROFILE ONLY. The District 2 draft-schema open items themselves remain OPEN.

riskBucketTaxonomy.description: Pinned riskBucket taxonomy (UP-6), matching AnalystScoreTemplate.riskBucket. The D2 example value 'moderate' is recorded as inconsistent with this taxonomy and is reconciled (example-only change) in PR-UWR-CONFIG.

decaySurface.description: Decay surface pin (UP-7): GreeksDecayTemplate v1 template ids, half-lives, model and unit, as carried by ReactorScoredSignalV1.decayParams { halfLifeMinutes, greeksTemplateId }. thetaBias is declared-but-not-consumed; linear/cliff models are documented only, NOT pinned. Decay-engine canonicality remains OPEN and deferred to PR-7 (UP-8) — this pins the surface without resolving canonicality. targetHoldingMinutes/maxLifeMinutes are deliberately NOT recorded: UP-7 does not pin them.

unit.description: The pinned half-life unit is MINUTES (halfLifeMinutes). Unit drift elsewhere (baseHalfLifeHours in validatorConfig/afi-mint, halfLifeDays in USS telemetry.decay) is follow-up work, not adopted here.

templates.description: The pinned GreeksDecayTemplate v1 template set (UP-7). thetaBias values are recorded as DECLARED BUT NOT CONSUMED by any computation; they are not pinned as behavior.

horizonSelection.description: The pinned horizon-selection mapping (pickDecayParamsForAnalystScore): identity for the four horizons, long-term maps to position, unknown/missing maps to swing (UP-7).

qualification.description: Qualification values recorded as TESTNET-PROVISIONAL (UP-9); the existing defaults in schemas/validatorConfig.schema.json and afi-mint DEFAULT_VALIDATOR_CONFIG. Recording these values does NOT wire the qualification gate: no IValidatorScorer implementation or composition root exists, and wiring remains separately authorized. The canonical term is 'challenge window' (never 'challenge period').

scorerIdentity.description: Scorer identity pin (UP-10): the profile is recognized only for the reference scorer pair. Additional analysts/strategies require either registration under this profile (if value-identical) or new profile versions — always registered and pinned, never silent.

strategyVersion.description: OPTIONAL strategy version, recognized where present (UP-10).

katRefs.description: KAT vector file references (UP-11). The profile may not back any reward-qualified or mint-eligible flow until these KAT vectors exist and the D2 M2 goldens remain byte-stable. Vectors are PURE DATA in afi-config; KAT execution against afi-core code is the separately-authorized PR-UWR-KAT-EXEC.

doctrineRefs.description: Governance decisions this registration derives from and is subordinate to.
